title: A Grueling Match
lines: You dig your heels into the cold, sticky mud. The 'forwards' of the zombie pack are just feet away, their eyes glazed and their jerseys caked in blood.
Your breath comes in ragged gasps. The sheer physical pressure of the undead line is suffocating.

options.desc: 1. Push back with all your weight
2. Try to kick the mud into their eyes
